description: Initializes the official Auth0 MCP Server so LLM-based clients (Claude Desktop, Cursor, Windsurf, VS Code) can manage Auth0 Applications, Resource Servers, Actions, Logs, Forms, and Grants via Model Context Protocol.

flags.--read-only: Restrict the server to read-only operations.
flags.--tools: Glob pattern to filter exposed tools, e.g. 'auth0_list_*,auth0_get_*'.
